question_html: Write a short paragraph on “Youth Leadership”.
solution_html:
Youth Leadership

Youth leadership refers to the ability of young people to guide, inspire and influence others to achieve common goals. It involves developing qualities like responsibility, vision, empathy and decision-making skills, which enable young leaders to address challenges in their communities or organizations. Effective youth leadership empowers young individuals to take initiative, foster collaboration and become agents of positive change. Through leadership opportunities, youth gain confidence and a sense of purpose, helping them become active contributors to society. Programs focused on youth leadership often include mentoring, skill-building workshops, and community service, providing young people with the tools they need to succeed. In a rapidly changing world, youth leadership is essential for tackling issues such as social justice, environmental sustainability and educational reform. By encouraging youth to take on leadership roles, we are not only shaping their future but also strengthening the broader community.

Marks Distribution:

01 mark for mentioning, Youth leadership refers to the ability of young people to guide, inspire and influence others to achieve common goals.

01 mark for mentioning, Programs focused on youth leadership often include mentoring, skill-building workshops, and community service, providing young people with the tools they need to succeed.

0.5 mark for mentioning, by encouraging youth to take on leadership roles, we are not only shaping their future but also strengthening the broader community.

[N.B: 0.5 mark will be deducted for one or two grammar or spelling mistakes, 01 mark for three or more grammar or spelling mistakes.]

question_html:
Translate the following passage into Bangla:

Modern science teaches us that no one can live alone. People need to cooperate with each other, and families also need to work together to survive. Humans are different from wild animals in this way. Cooperation is not only important among individuals and families, but nations must also cooperate to continue life on Earth. Strong cooperation between nations is essential for the well-being of mankind.
